name: paullinia yoco
mechanism: Saponins may contribute membrane and immune-modulating effects
safetyNotes: Avoid with hypertension; Avoid with heart disease; Avoid with anxiety disorders

sources.title: PubMed search: Paullinia yoco

description: Amazonian vine used by indigenous tribes as a stimulant tea; contains caffeine; culturally significant in morning rituals.
